title: Extended Ingame Hud
description: adds armor, weapon and statuseffects hud, legacy fabric mod for 1.8.x
body:
This mod adds an armor-, weapon- and statuseffects-hud, as seen in the pictures in the gallery.

It is very similar to huds you can find in many PVP clients, but made as a lightweight mod for Legacy Fabric, to potentially be used with other Legacy Fabric mods.

It works for versions 1.8.x, if you want to use it in other versions, open an issue on the github and I'll consider porting it!
